title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering separates the wrapper infrastructure around a coding agent from the underlying model, with roughly 98 percent of a system like Claude Code being harness. It operates at two levels: an AI layer managing single sessions through rules, skills, and hooks, and orchestration of multiple agent sessions into workflows where each handles a focused task.
